name: Yum China Holdings, Inc.
summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. is a leading restaurant company in China. It operates as a franchisee of Yum! Brands, Inc. and is the largest restaurant company in China by store count. The company's portfolio includes well-known brands such as KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell, as well as emerging concepts like Huang Ji Huang and COFFii & JOY.
